title: S35-01/S35-02: DIS ForceState endpoint + lazy collector URL fix
body: --findings S35-01: POST /dis/force?state=<state> with Bearer auth. --admin-token flag enables it. Admin panel Force Posture button + token field added to edis-dis.php. S35-02: EDIS_DIS_COLLECTOR_URL constant replaced with edis_dis_collector_url() lazy function — option changes now take effect immediately. Tests pass. Commit c5f9982.
